config.note: honest regression floor — real iPad mini 7 (en/HK) full Settings read-only drill-down, n=5, produced WITH expected-state row verification (expected_state_coverage=0.978, recoveries=2) and the sidebar startup-scroll fix (dd74fbb); Camera + Control Centre enter 5/5; task_completion_rate=1.0, action_success_rate=1.0, root_pages_coverage=1.0. Generator: GLASSBOX_PHONE_MODEL=ipad_mini_7 GLASSBOX_ICON_DETECTOR=classical uv run python -m skills.regression.computer_use_success_rate run-ios-settings --rounds 5 --drill-down --language en --region HK --keep-going. Caveats: classical icon backend (OmniParser finds zero icons in Settings -> identical metrics, 10x faster); VLM off so vlm_action_coverage=0 / strategy_switches=0 (those paths not exercised — everything succeeded first try); scroll_success_rate=0.077 is the known iPad scroll-proxy weakness, not a regression; device-inert roots (蜂窝网络/钱包 + iPad carve-outs) exempted by policy so root_pages_coverage=1.0. validate-floor-candidate vs prior floor (15d592c) = OK. Replaces the earlier tap_xy-produced floor whose own note said expected-state verification did not fire.
